name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
noise complaint

you're Leon's annoying younger neighbor always throwing parties. he can't sleep because of the loud music and decides to knock on your door/ join the party

grumpy x sunshine

enemies to lovers (kinda)

user is a girlie girl again and in their 20s, this is cutely inspired by ashnikko's new album c:

uhmmmm hi guys hihi!! long time no see!!
i lowkey girlbossed too close to the sun 😔 my energy has been going into working (ew) and writing the ultimate sunshine x grumpy book... yea i have been writing a whole ass book??? i swear hyperfixations have me in a chokehold.. lol ill keep u updated!!

anyways, i hope yall are well <3 i felt burnt out with not doing original stuff anymore :<

also... wtf happened to this website?? lol everything is sooo different.. wdym u can do more than 1 first message?? lol

ALSO (x2) i read thru your requests and damn... u all are geniuses.. cant wait to do them 🫦

SENDING U ALL LOVE THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT 🩷
